chunks.title: The Feast and the Writing
chunks.reason: Describes the banquet, use of temple vessels, and the appearance of the writing hand.

chunks.title: The King's Alarm and Call for Sages
chunks.reason: Details the king's physical reaction and his offer of reward to those who interpret the writing.

chunks.title: The Queen's Recommendation
chunks.reason: The queen advises the king to summon Daniel for his wisdom.

chunks.title: Daniel Brought Before the King
chunks.reason: The king questions Daniel and repeats the offer of reward.

chunks.title: Daniel's Rebuke
chunks.reason: Daniel accepts the challenge and recounts Nebuchadnezzar's fall to warn Belshazzar.

chunks.title: The Interpretation of MENE
chunks.reason: Daniel interprets the words written on the wall.

chunks.title: The King's Death and Darius's Reign
chunks.reason: Concludes with Daniel's reward, Belshazzar's death, and the succession of Darius.
